title: The Employment of Manual Scavengers and Construction of Dry Latrines (Prohibition) Act, 1993
full_text: The Employment of Manual Scavengers and Construction of Dry Latrines (Prohibition) Act, 1993 सफाई कर्मचारी नियोजन और शुष्‍क शौचालयसन्‍निर्माण (प्रतिषेध) अधिनियम,1993 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 199346 Act Number: 46 Enactment Date: 1993-06-05 Act Year: 1993 Short Title: The Employment of Manual Scavengers and Construction of Dry Latrines (Prohibition) Act, 1993 Hindi Title: सफाई कर्मचारी नियोजन और शुष्‍क शौचालयसन्‍निर्माण (प्रतिषेध) अधिनियम,1993 Long Title: An Act to provide for the prohibition of employment of manual scavengers as well as construction or continuance of dry latrines and for the regulation of construction and maintenance of water-seal latrines and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment Department: Department of Social Justice and Empowerment Enforcement Date: 26-01-1997 Notification: 26th January, 1997, vide notification No. S.O. 58(E), dated 24th January, 1997, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Employment of Manual Scavengers and Construction of Dry Latrines (Prohibition) Act, 1993 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II PROHIBITION OF EMPLOYMENT OF MANUAL SCAVENGERS, ETC. CHAPTER III IMPLEMENTING AUTHORITIES AND SCHEMES CHAPTER IV PENALTIES AND PROCEDURE CHAPTER V MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title, application and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Prohibition of employment of manual scavengers, etc. Section 4. Power to exempt. Section 5. Appointment of Executive Authorities and their powers and functions. Section 6. Power of State Government to make schemes. Section 7. Power of State Government to issue directions. Section 8. Executive Authorities, inspectors, officers and other employees of such authorities to be public servants. Section 9. Appointment of inspectors and their powers of entry and inspection. Section 10. Power of Executive Authority to prevent environmental pollution in certain cases. Section 11. Duty of HUDCO to extend financial assistance in certain cases. Section 12. Power to levy fee. Section 13. Constitution of committees. Section 14. Penalty for contravention of the provisions of the Act and rules, orders, directions and schemes. Section 15. Offences by companies. Section 16. Offences to be cognizable. Section 17. Provision in relation to jurisdiction. Section 18. Limitation of prosecution. Section 19. Information, reports or returns. Section 20. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 21. Effect of other laws and agreements inconsistent with the Act. Section 22. Power of Central Government to make rules. Section 23. Power of State Government to make rules. Section 24. Power to remove difficulties.
